asset: HDL source files; third-party IP cores; HLS source; IP metadata
required_evidence: IP provider identity; source repository URL or package origin; version; license; cryptographic digest; review approval; dependency manifest
mitigation_family: IP provenance review; signed source releases; access control; dependency manifest; confidential IP handling

asset: Timing constraints; pin constraints; physical constraints; synthesis/implementation options
required_evidence: Constraint file digest; reviewer approval; change rationale; tool option snapshot; target device identifier; clock/pin ownership record
mitigation_family: Change control; constraint review; protected configuration baselines; timing-closure guardrails

asset: Test benches; simulation scripts; simulation outputs; waveform/report artifacts
trust_boundary: Design model to verification evidence boundary
required_evidence: Test bench version; simulation command line; simulator version; input vector digest; result/report digest; waveform/log digest; reviewer note
mitigation_family: Verification provenance; simulation-result integrity; waveform/log classification; result-to-source linkage

asset: RTL-to-netlist output; synthesis logs; generated netlist; checkpoint
required_evidence: Tool version; synthesis options; source digest set; generated netlist digest; synthesis log digest; reproducible command manifest
mitigation_family: Transformation manifest; reproducible build recipe; protected intermediate artifacts

asset: Implementation checkpoint; placement/routing database; seed/options; routed netlist
required_evidence: Implementation seed/options; checkpoint digest; device/resource target; route database digest; timing constraint linkage
mitigation_family: Checkpoint integrity; configuration baselining; build-resource monitoring

asset: EDA executable; plugin; Tcl package; IP generator; build container; license state; tool/IP version state
trust_boundary: Toolchain environment to artifact transformation run
required_evidence: Tool/image digest; installation manifest; plugin/package digest; runner provenance; license file/server record; license report; tool version; IP status or upgrade log; update/interim-update state
stride_categories: Spoofing; Tampering; Repudiation; Denial of Service
mitigation_family: Pinned tool environment; plugin allowlist; license-state provenance; version/update attestation; runner provenance

asset: Timing reports; utilization reports; DRC/CDC/security review reports
trust_boundary: Tool output to human decision boundary
required_evidence: Report generator version; command manifest; report digest; timestamp; signer or CI identity; linkage to source/netlist/bitstream digest
mitigation_family: Signed reports; immutable logs; protected report repository; review workflow

asset: Full or partial bitstream; metadata; encryption/signing material; bitstream manifest
trust_boundary: Implementation artifact to deployable configuration boundary
required_evidence: Bitstream digest; source/checkpoint lineage; signing identity; key-handling record; encryption/signature status; release approval
stride_categories: Spoofing; Tampering; Information Disclosure; Elevation of Privilege
mitigation_family: Bitstream signing; key separation; artifact repository controls; release authorization

asset: Programming target; programmer identity; deployed bitstream; deployment log; readback/status/debug evidence
trust_boundary: Build/release system to physical or remote programming target boundary
required_evidence: Programming target identity; operator/CI identity; bitstream digest; device serial or logical target; timestamp; deployment log; rollback record; readback/status log; verify command; debug capture digest
stride_categories: Spoofing; Tampering; Repudiation; Information Disclosure; Elevation of Privilege; Denial of Service
mitigation_family: Target authentication; least-privilege programming; deployment logging; rollback controls; protected readback/status evidence

asset: Build manifest; release bundle; artifact repository; signing service; build logs
required_evidence: Workflow identity; build runner identity; artifact digest set; release manifest; approval record; signing event; service-account identity; protected-environment record; provenance attestation
stride_categories: Repudiation; Elevation of Privilege; Tampering; Information Disclosure
mitigation_family: SLSA-style provenance; in-toto layout; Sigstore-style signing where configured; protected artifact registry; separation of duties
